creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 252253
www/ytdownloader

> Your pre-install target won't work in Poudriere without networking.
Oh, I didn't know that, thanks.

> Instead I advice you to take Linux distibution ( YTDownloader_Linux_x86_64.zip ) and employ USES=electronfix to transform it into a native FreeBSD application.

I did so now, thanks. Upstream application uses Electron 27 which is reached to it's EOL in FreeBSD so I forked the upstream repo, updated it to Electron 30 and published a release there, this is temporary until upstream updated to Electron 30.

Thanks for giving a look to port request.
